data.label: True
data.explanation: Sis, mukhang legit naman ‘to! The DOH is serious about a total vape ban and removing those flavors. According to the sources, they see vaping as a health risk, especially sa mga kabataan. Kaya todo push sila na tanggalin ang vape!
claims: DOH wants stricter enforcement of the law removing vape flavors while awaiting a total vape ban in the country

literacyLesson.summary: Sis, this post is legit! It's all about the Department of Health (DOH) pushing for stricter vape rules, so let's break down why we can trust it.

points.issue: Teh, the post says DOH is serious about removing vape flavors while waiting for a total ban, and guess what? Major news outlets like Rappler and ABS-CBN are backing it up!
points.correction: Mhie, seeing multiple trusted sources report the same thing is a super good sign the info is legit and not just chismis.

points.issue: The post mentions 'mahigpit na pagpapatupad ng batas,' which is exactly what news orgs are reporting.
points.correction: When the details match between a social media post and credible news, it strengthens the post's reliability.

points.issue: The post has some ALL CAPS and !! going on, which can sometimes be a red flag.
points.correction: Even with the 'shouting,' the core info is still factual because credible sources confirm it, so don't dismiss it right away, but always double check!

literacyLesson.tip: Next time, sis, always look for other reputable news sources reporting the same info before believing anything you see online!
